name: Brad Knott
stanceSummary: Track AIPAC reports an Israel Lobby Total of $25,050 for Brad Knott in U.S. House, NC-13. Public statements and congressional records indicate an Israel-focused security policy posture in recent conflict framing. This candidate has taken funding from the Israel lobby.
